The '''Aramand Cluster''' was in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It contained the systems of [[Aramand system/Legends|Aramand]], [[Orma system/Legends|Orma]], [[Cirra system/Legends|Cirra]], [[Mila system/Legends|Mila]] and [[Lota system/Legends|Lota]], all of which were within seven light years of each other.
